/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/openspodes_test_errors.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/openspodes_test_errors.dir/tests/test_errors.c.o CMakeFiles/openspodes_test_errors.dir/tests/mock_transport.c.o CMakeFiles/openspodes_test_errors.dir/tests/mock_crypto.c.o CMakeFiles/openspodes_test_errors.dir/tests/real_crypto.c.o -o openspodes_test_errors  libopenspodes.a _deps/cmocka-build/src/libcmocka.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
